data.name: Logout/Html.SingleTab.LogoutNotice
data.value: You have Only been logged out on this tab.

data.name: Logout/SingleTab.LogoutNotice.Small
data.value: Ensure that you close all other tabs of My-Worksheet before leaving the device as other tabs might still display Sensible data.

data.name: Logout/OtherTab.Notice
data.value:
You have been logged out from another tab of this Device.
For the safety of all of your data you have been logged out on this browser

data.name: Register/AcceptText
data.value: I have read and Accept the

data.name: Register/BetaNotice_1
data.value: My-Worksheet is Still in Beta. That means it can be used in Production but it will undergo changes. By creating an Account on My-Worksheet you accept the

data.name: Register/BetaNotice_2
data.value: Please be aware that the UI and your data might be used for anonymous analytic

data.name: Register/RegisterRequirementsMet
data.value: You have Accepted and filled the Form you can now Register here:

data.name: Register/EMail.Hint
data.value: You Primary Email address where you recive all mails from My-Worksheet

data.name: Register/Username.Hint
data.value: The username you want to use for Login

data.name: Unauthorised/Text
data.value: This site does not seem to exist or you are not allowed to see it.

data.name: UserSettings/Alert.ChangeData
data.value: Info. Please change your Username and Password. After that, you can continue

data.name: UserQuota/ProjectQuotaExceeded
data.value: Warning. You have exceeded all of your {Entity/Project} Quota. Please order more to create new {Entity/Projects}

data.name: UserQuota/WorksheetQuotaExceeded
data.value: Warning. You have exceeded all of your {Entity/Worksheet} Quota. Please order more to create new {Entity/Worksheets}

data.name: UserSettings/Alert.MissingSettingsUserRole
data.value: You are currently not allowed to change some of your settings. Please respond to your administrator to obtain the "Settings User" role

data.name: UserSettings/Settings.PasswordHint
data.value: Great! now please create a new password below

data.name: UserSettings/Html.TimeLocale.Hint
data.value: Changes how Times are displayed in the browser not the language

data.name: UserSettings/Misc.DecimalTimes.Hint
data.value: Display all times as decimals. 10:45 (10 hours and 45 minutes) will be displayed as 10,75 (10 hours and 75th of an hour)

data.name: Worktime/WeeklyWorktime.Hint
data.value: How many hours per week. Format: HH*HH:MM. Minutes are optional.

data.name: Org/Name.Hint
data.value: The full name of this new Organisation

data.name: Org/SharedId.Hint
data.value: The Shared/short name that can be used for searching

data.name: Org/Active.Hint
data.value: Is this Organisation still active. If inactive it will not longer be selectable from Projects and all Projects attached to it will be inaccessable

data.name: Org/ParentOrg.Hint
data.value: The Parent Organisations. This allows an hirachie of Organisations.

data.name: Invite/ValidOnce.Hint
data.value: Is the link One time usage?

data.name: RedeemInvite/Title.NeedLogin.Hint
data.value: Please use the button below to Login and return to this screen

data.name: RedeemInvite/NeedLogin.Register.Hint
data.value: Please register/login first on My-Worksheet with the button below. Then open the link again.

data.name: RedeemInvite/InviteStatus.Title
data.value: You are invited by '{0}' to Connect your Account to his

data.name: RedeemInvite/InviteStatus.InviteFrom_1
data.value: Please verify that you obtained this Link from '{0}'.

data.name: RedeemInvite/InviteStatus.InviteFrom_2
data.value: If not, please leave this page.

data.name: RedeemInvite/InviteStatus.InviteFrom.Hint_1
data.value: If you click on the button "Link" below your account will be linked to the account of '{0}'.

data.name: Contact/Email.Hint
data.value: For response please enter your Mail-Address

data.name: Contact/RequestKind.Hint
data.value: What kind of Request you have

data.name: Logout/Confirm
data.value: Please confirm that you want to logout.

data.name: ChangePassword/Text
data.value: By changing your password you will logout everywhere including this device.

data.name: Project/ConfirmDelete.Text_1
data.value: Please confirm that you want to delete the {Entity/Project}

data.name: Project/ConfirmDelete.Text_2
data.value: by typing the {Entity/Project} name to the lower box.

data.name: Project/ConfirmDelete.Text_3.Html
data.value: Please be aware that if you delete the {Entity/Project}, also all {Entity/Worksheets} and Worksheet Items are non rewindable lost.

data.name: Worksheet/ConfirmDelete.Text_1
data.value: Please confirm that you want to delete the {Entity/Worksheet}.

data.name: Worksheet/ConfirmDelete.Text_2.Html
data.value: Please be aware that if you delete the {Entity/Worksheet}, also all Worksheet Items are non rewindable lost.

data.name: WorksheetItem/Merge.Suggested
data.value: This is the suggested Item by the Auto-Merger

data.name: UserSettings/LogoutEverywhere.Text
data.value: Please confirm that you want to logout everywhere including this PC.

data.name: RegisterTemp/Hint
data.value: Please enter your Mail-Address to receive your Temporary Username and Password.

data.name: RequestPassword/Title.Hint
data.value: Please enter your Username and E-Mail Address that is currently active on your Account to recive a Password reset Link

data.name: Workflow/ConfirmStatus.Title.Html
data.value: Please confirm that you want to change the State to {0} the {Entity/Worksheet} {1} - {2} in the Project "{3}"

data.name: FAQ/Title.Hint
data.value: Simple answers to your most common questions

data.name: FAQ/Q1
data.value: Will my worksheet fit my needs?

data.name: FAQ/Q1A
data.value: Hopefully yes. My-Worksheet is designed for Freelancer and Self-Employed people who work for a particular Client or Project.

data.name: FAQ/Q2
data.value: This is still beta, what does this mean?

data.name: FAQ/Q2A
data.value: Well that means that some features might change in the Future as this project is devloped over a long time yet. But this includes mostly new Features and stable ones might just get small changes or bugfixes.

data.name: FAQ/Q3A.Html
data.value:
The core of My-Worksheet is all about to document in a most easy way, your worked times so you can take care of your customer.
It includes ways to enter your worked times, show yourself an overview, generate Bills and Timereports and more.

data.name: FAQ/Q4
data.value: Ok but i use an cool 10 year old Excel Worksheet, why should i move to My-Worksheet?

data.name: FAQ/Q4A.Html
data.value: If you are going fine with it, maybe not. But if you ever asked yourself: <q>Oh no end of the month i have to print my bill and send it and and and...</q> you might want to take a look at the Automatisation features that coming soon.

data.name: FAQ/Q5
data.value: Who are you and why did you even created My-Worksheet?

data.name: FAQ/Q5A
data.value: I'm a IT-Freelancer who asked himself this questions in 2010. In the first few year i had an old style worksheet, i took from another Freelancer (Thank you Christian) but shortly i discovered there must be a better, a IT Style way. So i made a search for a webpage that fit my needs but did not found one that was secure (Full encryption) had all features (Time report generation) and most of them where just too complex. Also all of them had only a subscription model, so i had to bind myself to it.

data.name: FAQ/Q6A_1.Html
data.value: For single Persons and for the Cloud variant (The site hosted under My-Worksheet.com) its free. By using My-Worksheet.com you agree with the

data.name: FAQ/Q6A_2
data.value: However you can buy a version to be hosted on your network or let me host your instance of My-Worksheet. Please contact me for a proposal at

data.name: FAQ/Q7
data.value: My-Worksheet was created as an helping alternative to excel and other, simpler time tracking tools.

data.name: FAQ/Q8
data.value: I am a Software developer myself or i want to integrate into My-Worksheet for my company.

data.name: FAQ/Q8A
data.value:
Sure thing, the whole webpage is allowed to be accessed by standard Http. You can get your own Server and Sub-domain.
If you ever need help with your project related to My-Worksheet, don`t hassle to contact me. For more Infos contact me at

data.name: PaymentInfo/Detail.Disclaimer.Hint
data.value: The Payment Disclaimer as payment terms or conditions

data.name: PaymentInfo/Detail.PaymentType.Hint
data.value: The name/descriptor for this Payment type

data.name: FormatterInfo/Text_1
data.value: A Formatter can be applied to the corresponding element in the template.If it matches the type, please lookup the type in the schema section in your template. To use a formatter end the the property with 2 brackets like this: "

data.name: FormatterInfo/Text_2
data.value: " If the formatter has arguments you must write them into the brackets.

data.name: FormatterInfo/Text_4.Html
data.value:
where "time" is the name of the formatter and "t" is its argument
First we write the property then the brackets. Next we write the formatter to use, in this example the 'time' formatter. the 'time' formatter accepts multiple arguments. The 'time, t' argument will format the property WorkedTime into a readable format

data.name: Template/FileType.Hint
data.value: The file ending. Use "pdf" without quotes to generate a PDF from Html.

data.name: Template/FileExtenstion.Hint
data.value: The type of Document that you are creating, for example "xml", "json", "txt", "csv" without quotes.

data.name: Dashboard/NoMorePlugins
data.value: There are no more plugins to you for adding

data.name: LinkRedeemed/Alert.Title
data.value: Your connection to '{0}'s account was successfully to created. See your User Options for more infos

data.name: InvalidFileToken/Text
data.value: The file you requested was moved/deleted or the token used is expired.

data.name: UserStorageDetail/IsDefaultProvider.Hint
data.value: The default storage provider will be preselected each time you have to store a file.

data.name: Webhook/PurgeHint
data.value: Will Purge History and Reset the Secret

data.name: Budget/NoBudgets
data.value: No Budgets for the selected project

data.name: Budget/AllowOverbooking.Hint
data.value: If set the user is allowed to overbook/enter worktimes beyond the boundaries set in the budgets

data.name: Budget/Deadline.Hint
data.value: After what date is the user no longer be able to enter times into the Projects

data.name: Budget/TimeBudget.Hint
data.value: How much time is the user allowed to enter. Format: hhh*hh:mm

data.name: Budget/TimeBudget.Min24h
data.value: Time Budget must be at least 24 hours

data.name: WorksheetAction.Editor/SingleValue.Hint
data.value: Set a Property on the Day

data.name: WorksheetAction.Editor/StatusText.Hint
data.value: Add a Printable-Status code to this Day

data.name: WorksheetAction.Editor/WorksheetItems.PersistantWarning.Html
data.value: Warning. You have entered a Worksheet item and made it Persistent. Every time you open the {Entity/Worksheet} a New Worksheet item will be added!

data.name: WorksheetAction.Editor/WorksheetItems.Hint
data.value: Add a Item-Unit the the Day

data.name: GeoFence/Name.Hint
data.value: A Well known name for this GeoFence

data.name: GeoFence/ForProject.Hint
data.value: What {Entity/Project} does this Geo-Fence belongs to

data.name: GeoFence/Map.Hint
data.value: Add 1 Marker for a Range of 50 meters. Add 2 Marker to define a Circle. Add more then 3 to define a custom shaped area. You can Enable/Disable creating of new Markers on the top by clicking "Draw Geo Fence"

data.name: GeoFence/NameOfWifiEndpoint.Hint
data.value: If set the Name as seen in your WiFi list.

data.name: GeoFence/SSID.Hint
data.value: If set the exact SSID of the WiFi network. If you do not know what this is leave it empty

data.name: ProjectStatistics/NoDataInRange
data.value: No data in the Selected Range

data.name: ProjectStatistics/DataMightBeTruncated
data.value: The Visible data is maybe Truncated

data.name: WorkflowData/DisplayName.Hint
data.value: The name that is used for searching this {WorkflowData/Title} and displaying it

data.name: WorkflowData/ShareWithOrg.Hint
data.value: If shared with a Organization all members of the Organization can select this Dataset

data.name: Projects/AddressUnkown
data.value: The address of this {Entity/Organization} is unknown

data.name: Project/SubmittedWorksheetsHint
data.value: This {Entity/Project} has submitted {Entity/Worksheets} and cannot be edited

data.name: Project/Code.Hint
data.value: The Project code is used for shortly displaying the {Entity/Project} and for sorting

data.name: Project/Actions.CannotDelete
data.value: This {Entity/Project} cannot be deleted anymore for it has Submitted {Entity/Worksheets}

data.name: Worksheet/WorktimeGlobal.Hint
data.value: The current Worktime settings are your global ones. When you change them here, a new set for only this project will be created

data.name: WorksheetAction/Expert.Warning
data.value: Warning. When using the Expert Editor you might break the function of the Simple editor!

data.name: WorksheetAction/IsPersistent.Hint
data.value: Should this action always be applied when opening the {Entity/Worksheet}. A Must use for Assigned values, but not good for dynamically added Worksheet Items

data.name: WorksheetAction/Unparsable.Hint
data.value: This code is not generated from the Simple editor and not yet Parsable

data.name: WorksheetItem/PreReport.Hint
data.value: All values are meant to change

data.name: Budget/Deadline.AlmostExceeded
data.value: Deadline is almost reached. Renaming Time: '{0}'

data.name: Budget/Timebudget.AlmostExceeded
data.value: Time Budget is almost reached. Renaming Time: '{0}'

data.name: WorksheetItem/Inactive.Hint
data.value: That means its in the past or submitted

data.name: FileUpload/DropUnsupported
data.value: File Drag/Drop is not supported for this browser

data.name: WorksheetItem/Asserts.Name.Hint
data.value: The display name of this assert

data.name: WorksheetItem/Asserts.Value.Hint
data.value: What amount of money does this assert represents

data.name: WorksheetItem/Asserts.TaxRate.Hint
data.value: What percentage should be applied to the tax. If -1 the Project tax rate will be used

data.name: Address/EMail.Hint
data.value: The {Common/EMail} you Customer will see on your Invoices

data.name: Maintenance/LockoutEveryone.Hint
data.value: If set no user can access the website. Otherwise only a Warning is displayed.

data.name: About/Text_1
data.value: Hello, my name is Jean-Pierre Bachmann - Software Freelancer

data.name: About/Text_2
data.value: I am a Software freelancer since 2012 and had the idea of a simple to use but very Powerful Timetracking Webpage

data.name: About/Text_3
data.value: The project 'My-Worksheet' points directly forwards to freelancer and small companies.

data.name: About/Text_4
data.value: I have made some experience with some other Professional and self written solutions for Timetacking but non did fit all of my needs, so i decided to write a Platform for all those features myself.

data.name: FileUpload/Hint
data.value: Drop or click to upload files

data.name: Template/Editor.SaveHint
data.value: Use Ctrl+S to save or F11 to full screen, while in Editor

data.name: Template.Preview/NeedData
data.value: Before you can Preview this Report you must fill out all required data

data.name: Template.Preview/Hint
data.value: This page will refresh each time you save the Template anywhere else.

data.name: RunTemplate/IsObsolete.Hint
data.value: This generated Report is obsolete as you have changed the Template code

data.name: Home/Bulled.DataStorage.Text
data.value: My-Worksheet only stores thoose data that you enter directly into it. Everything else from Reports or Uploaded files will be stored on a Storage of your Choice.

data.name: Template/NoServerAvailable
data.value: There is currently no server available to execute this Report

data.name: SharedLinks/Name.Hint
data.value: The name of this Shared Link

data.name: SharedLinks/AllowPrinting.Hint
data.value: Controls if the viewer of the Shared Link can print directly from Browser

data.name: Url.Error/MustBeAbsolute
data.value: The url must be in absolute format

data.name: Url.Error/InvalidUrl
data.value: The url is in an invalid format

data.name: Url.Error/HostBlacklisted
data.value: The used host '{0}' is blacklisted on this platform. Please contact support.

data.name: Common.Error/DoesNotExist.Body
data.value: This resources does not exist here or you do not have the permission to access it. Please return there is nothing to see here

data.name: HttpHook/ConfirmClose.Body
data.value: You are about to deactivate this {Entity/Webhook} permanently. {Entity/Webhooks} cannot be deleted as they are used to call external resources on behalf of you over My-Worksheet Infastructure and will only be deleted after 6 Months. Continue?

data.name: Project.Model.Description/ProjectId
data.value: The {Entity/Project} PrimaryKey can be used to identify the entity

data.name: Project.Model.Description/NoModifications
data.value: When true the {Entity/Project} can no longer be altered.

data.name: Project.Model.Description/Name
data.value: The name of the {Entity/Project} as set by the user

data.name: Common.Delete/ConfirmDelete.Body
data.value: Are you sure that you want to delete this '{0}'?{1}

data.name: NumberRange/Description
data.value: Numberranges are tools that allows you to create custom counters for several operations. Define a {{NumberRange/Template}} and format the {{NumberRange/Counter}} as you wish. The {{NumberRange/Counter}} will count one up for every instance used

data.name: SignaL/LostConnection
data.value: There is no connection to My-Worksheet. Please wait while the site tries to reconnect

data.name: Common/ViewOrComponentIsLoading
data.value: Please wait while this Component is loading...

data.name: Workflow.Mail/Arguments.Comments.MailAccount
data.value: The Account from which all {Common/EMail} are send

data.name: Project.Model.Description/ProjectReference
data.value: The customers Reference code to be printed on an Invoice

data.name: UNAUTHORIZED/BODY
data.value: You are not Authorized to view this resource

data.name: Dashboard/Empty.Hint
data.value: Your dashboard is empty. Add widgets to get started.

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.Earnings.Description
data.value: Overview of recent invoices and billable hours

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.Tracker.Description
data.value: Shows all currently running time trackers

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.Reports.Description
data.value: Quick links to your shared public reports

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.TodayWorkload.Description
data.value: Your tracked time vs expected hours for today

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.TodayForProject.Description
data.value: Today's tracked time for a specific project

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.TrackerButton.Description
data.value: Start or stop the time tracker for a project

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.Orgs.Description
data.value: All organisations you are a member of

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.ProjectChart.SelectProject
data.value: Select a project to view its calendar

data.name: Dashboard/Widget.TrackerButton.NoActiveWorksheet
data.value: No active worksheet for this project

data.name: Dashboard/Welcome.Step.Projects.Hint
data.value: View and manage all your projects

data.name: Dashboard/Welcome.Step.NewProject.Hint
data.value: Create a new project and start tracking

data.name: Dashboard/Welcome.Step.Statistics.Hint
data.value: See charts and summaries of your work
